Task.Name: PHASE 1: Literature Review and Requirements Analysis (Wk 1-3)
Task.Notes: W1-W3: Apr 19 - May 09. Deliverable: documented requirements, gap analysis, and approved project proposal.

Task.Name: 1.1 Review peer-reviewed literature: Bhandari (2025); Zeijlemaker et al. (2025); Ponick and Wieczorek (2022); Batool et al. (2023)
1.2 Map EU regulatory requirements: DORA Art.6/9/11/13/17/28; NIS2 Art.21(2)(a)-(j); EU AI Act Art.9/13/14; GDPR Art.5/33/35
1.3 Define stakeholder requirements; compliance gap analysis; finalize SMART goals; ProjectLibre plan baseline
★ M1: Proposal Submission (Wk 3 — May 09, 2026)
Task.Notes: Deliverable: capstone_proposal.docx submitted to UoPeople portal.

Task.Name: PHASE 2: System Architecture and Design (Wk 4-5)
Task.Notes: W4-W5: May 10 - May 23. Deliverable: architecture document and component diagrams.

Task.Name: 2.1 HybridSOC conceptual architecture: multi-tenant Flask blueprints, SQLite WAL (60 migrations), request flow diagram
2.2 GRC integration model: weighted scoring engine (7 frameworks), FAISS RAG indexing, LLM commentary pipeline design
PHASE 3: Prototype Development (Wk 6-9)
Task.Notes: W6-W9: May 24 - Jun 01. Deliverable: browser-accessible HybridSOC+GRC prototype.

Task.Name: 3.1 Backend: Flask blueprints, SQLite schema, PBKDF2-SHA256 auth (260k iter + salt + PEPPER), TOTP+Email OTP MFA, audit log
3.2 Compliance engine: 50+ rule-based checks x 7 frameworks + Mistral-7B article-level commentary + FAISS RAG knowledge base
3.3 Risk Register (likelihood x impact), Crisis Management (DORA Art.17 timers), TPRM vendor registry (DORA Art.28)
3.4 React frontend: dashboard, document upload, incident view, awareness training UI, i18n EN/LT, PWA manifest
★ M2: Prototype Demo Ready (Wk 9 — Jun 01, 2026)
Task.Notes: Deliverable: working prototype at localhost:5000 — min. 5 critical DORA compliance gaps detected in synthetic scenario.

Task.Name: PHASE 4: Testing and Validation (Wk 10-11)
Task.Notes: W10-W11 compressed to Jun 02. Validates scoring accuracy and security controls.

Task.Name: 4.1 Simulated DORA scenario: upload synthetic self-assessment; verify scoring engine detects min. 5 Critical issues
4.2 Security testing: auth lockout, session scoping, multi-tenant isolation, audit log tamper check, NIST CSF 2.0 alignment
PHASE 5: Documentation and Final Report (Wk 12-13)
Task.Notes: HARD DEADLINE DAY: Jun 03, 2026, 23:55. All deliverables assembled and uploaded to UoPeople portal.

Task.Name: 5.1 Finalize capstone report: APA 7, Times New Roman 12pt, double-spaced, all reference URLs live-verified
5.2 Prepare GitHub README, architecture diagram, source code archive, MS Project XML and ProjectLibre .pod files
5.3 Final proofreading, compliance checklist review, package all deliverables, upload to UoPeople portal (deadline 23:55)
★ M3: FINAL CAPSTONE SUBMISSION — Jun 03, 2026, 23:55 (HARD DEADLINE)
Task.Notes: HARD DEADLINE: Jun 03 2026 23:55. Deliverables: final report (DOCX), prototype demo, architecture doc, source code, HybridSOC_GRC_Capstone.pod, HybridSOC_GRC_Capstone_MSProject.xml

Resource.Name: Regulatory Texts (DORA / NIS2 / EU AI Act / ISO 27001 / GDPR)
